one_time_description: Correction of an error related to unrecognized limited partnership investment transactions from prior period, increasing opening accumulated surplus by $398,576
economic_notes: Three business entities accounted for using modified equity method: Shackan Development Corporation (100% owned), K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.50%), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. COVID-19 noted as significant event with uncertain future impact.
notes: Financial statements are restated for 2019 comparative figures due to correction of errors related to unrecognized limited partnership investments totaling $398,576 increase to opening accumulated surplus. Three GBEs accounted for using modified equity method: Shackan Development Corporation, K'en T'em Limited Partnership, Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. Funds held in Ottawa Trust ($408,664) included in financial assets. Reforestation obligation of $34,954 included in liabilities. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,446,896) + Province of BC ($282,122) + FNESC ($22,886) + CMHC ($6,105) + FNIYES ($21,000) + Emergency funding ($34,393) + BC Hydro ($16,100) + Ottawa Trust Provincial grants ($23,723) = $1,853,225 plus other government from segment ($685,648 minus ISC $1,446,896 already counted) — using segment data: Other government transfers = $685,648 which includes Province BC, FNESC, CMHC, BC Hydro, Ottawa Trust grants; total government transfers = $1,446,896 + $685,648 = $2,132,544. OSR = $3,509,389 - $2,132,544 = $1,376,845 matching economic activities and other from segment schedule.
